programmes.show_description: Every weekday night on Court TV, Vinnie Politan takes a deep dive into the True Crime stories that are captivating the nation. Now, you can catch the sharp analysis and insightful interviews.
Your Front Row Seat to Justice. Taking you beyond the headlines and into the courtroom, with in-depth legal reporting and expert analysis of the most important and compelling trials.

FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
A plumber answers his door and is shot to death outside of his own home.  His assistant is the prime suspect, but could his killer be someone closer?
A world-renowned psychiatrist and his son are found murdered in their home. Could an apology letter from a former employee hold the key to solving this case?
A newlywed couple both shot while sitting in their car. Now the ex-husband finds himself under suspicion.  Was it a random act of violence or something much more sinister?
A couple is shot by an intruder, killing the wife. Now the investigation uncovers family secrets including an affair with a co-worker and trusted friend. But will any of it lead to a conviction?
...With Vinnie Politan. The series looks beyond the usual suspects to bring you the gripping stories of everyday people caught up in a world of deception and manipulation as they become accomplices.
Your Front Row Seat to Justice. Taking you beyond the headlines and into the courtroom, with in-depth legal reporting and expert analysis of the most important and compelling trials.
